};
784
 
785
// Fallback financial generator for stocks not in FIN database
786
function makeFallbackFin(s){
787
const annualPAT = Math.round(s.mcapCr / s.pe);
788
const annualRev = Math.round(annualPAT / (s.netMargin/100));
789
const ebitda = s.opm ? Math.round(annualRev * s.opm / 100) : null;
790
const equity = Math.round(s.mcapCr / s.pb);
791
const pl=[],bs=[],cf=[],ratios=[],q=[];
792
for(let i=0;i<5;i++){
793
const gr=Math.pow(1+0.12,4-i);
794
const rev=Math.round(annualRev/gr);
795
const pat=Math.round(annualPAT/gr);
796
const eb=ebitda?Math.round(ebitda/gr):null;
797
const eq=Math.round(equity/Math.pow(1+0.10,4-i));
798
const debt=Math.round(eq*(s.debtEq||0));
799
pl.push({y:['FY25','FY24','FY23','FY22','FY21'][i],rev,ebitda:eb,ebitdaM:s.opm,pat,eps:parseFloat((pat*10/s.mcapCr*s.fv).toFixed(1))});
800
bs.push({y:['FY25','FY24','FY23','FY22','FY21'][i],equity:eq,debt,assets:eq+debt+Math.round(eq*0.5),cash:Math.round(eq*0.15),deq:s.debtEq||0});
801
cf.push({y:['FY25','FY24','FY23','FY22','FY21'][i],cfo:Math.round(pat*1.3),cfi:Math.round(-pat*0.4),cff:Math.round(-pat*0.8),fcf:Math.round(pat*0.9)});
802
ratios.push({y:['FY25','FY24','FY23','FY22','FY21'][i],pe:s.pe*(1+i*0.04),pb:s.pb*(1+i*0.04),roe:s.roe*(1-i*0.02),roce:s.roce*(1-i*0.02),npm:s.netMargin,opm:s.opm,dy:s.div});
803
}
804
for(let i=0;i<8;i++){
805
const qPAT=Math.round(annualPAT/4/(Math.pow(1+0.03,i)));
806
const qRev=Math.round(annualRev/4/(Math.pow(1+0.03,i)));
807
const est=Math.round(qPAT*(0.96+Math.random()*0.04));
808
const actual=Math.round(qPAT*(0.95+Math.random()*0.1));
809
const qtrs=['Q4 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q1 FY25','Q4 FY24','Q3 FY24','Q2 FY24','Q1 FY24'];
810
q.push({q:qtrs[i],rev:qRev,estP:est,actP:actual,beat:actual>=est});
811
}
812
const fwdEst=[
813
{q:'Q1 FY26',estRev:Math.round(annualRev/4*1.10),estP:Math.round(annualPAT/4*1.10),estEPS:parseFloat((annualPAT/4*1.10*10/s.mcapCr*s.fv/4).toFixed(1)),conf:'Medium',reason:`${s.sector} sector expected to grow 10-15% in FY26. ${s.name} has strong order book and pricing power.`},
814
{q:'Q2 FY26',estRev:Math.round(annualRev/4*1.12),estP:Math.round(annualPAT/4*1.12),estEPS:parseFloat((annualPAT/4*1.12*10/s.mcapCr*s.fv/4).toFixed(1)),conf:'Medium',reason:`Margin expansion expected from operating leverage. Volume recovery + premiumisation driving growth.`},
815
];
816
return {pl,bs,cf,ratios,quarterly:q,fwdEst,
817
projects:[
818
{name:'Capacity Expansion Phase II',status:'ongoing',detail:`₹${Math.round(annualRev*0.08/100)*100} Cr capex for new production facilities. 30% volume increase target by FY27.`,value:`₹${Math.round(annualRev*0.08/100)*100} Cr`},
819
{name:'Digital Transformation',status:'upcoming',detail:'ERP upgrade, supply chain digitization, and customer-facing app launch.',value:'₹800 Cr'},
820
{name:'Strategic Acquisition',status:'completed',detail:'Acquired domestic competitor to strengthen market share and product portfolio.',value:'₹1,200 Cr'},
821
],
822
shareholding:{pro:Math.round(40+Math.random()*20),fii:Math.round(15+Math.random()*15),dii:Math.round(10+Math.random()*10),pub:0},
823
crashRet:{covid:Math.round(-25-s.beta*15),gfc:Math.round(-38-s.beta*18),demonet:Math.round(-8-s.beta*5),nbfc:Math.round(-12-s.beta*6)},
824
annRet:{FY25:Math.round(s.chg*28),FY24:Math.round(s.chg*22),FY23:Math.round(s.chg*18),FY22:Math.round(s.chg*14),FY21:Math.round(s.chg*24)},
825
};
826
}
827
 
828
function getFin(s){
829
const d=FIN[s.sym];
830
if(d){
831
// Fix shareholding pub
832
if(d.shareholding && !d.shareholding.pub){
833
d.shareholding.pub=Math.max(0,100-d.shareholding.pro-d.shareholding.fii-d.shareholding.dii);
834
}
835
return d;
836
}
837
return makeFallbackFin(s);
838
}
839
 
840
// =====================================================================
841
// ANNUAL RETURNS DATA (Year-wise for movers)
842
// =====================================================================
843
const ANNUAL_RETURNS = {
844
FY25:{TCS:28,INFY:32,WIPRO:24,HCLTECH:38,TECHM:42,HDFCBANK:4,ICICIBANK:28,KOTAKBANK:18,AXISBANK:32,SBIN:42,BAJFINANCE:22,INDUSINDBK:-28,RELIANCE:18,ONGC:42,NTPC:64,POWERGRID:58,COALINDIA:88,BPCL:24,HINDUNILVR:-12,ITC:12,NESTLEIND:-8,BRITANNIA:-14,TITAN:-12,ASIANPAINT:-22,PIDILITIND:8,TRENT:168,MARUTI:28,TATAMOTORS:62,MM:88,EICHERMOT:28,HEROMOTOCO:18,SUNPHARMA:52,DRREDDY:28,CIPLA:34,APOLLOHOSP:48,DIVISLAB:22,LT:38,ULTRACEMCO:24,GRASIM:48,ADANIPORTS:82,HAL:84,BEL:148,TATASTEEL:8,JSWSTEEL:18,HINDALCO:24,BHARTIARTL:62,BAJAJFINSV:28,SHRIRAMFIN:42},
845
FY24:{TCS:42,INFY:22,WIPRO:18,HCLTECH:58,TECHM:28,HDFCBANK:12,ICICIBANK:38,KOTAKBANK:-4,AXISBANK:48,SBIN:62,BAJFINANCE:28,INDUSINDBK:32,RELIANCE:24,ONGC:52,NTPC:88,POWERGRID:72,COALINDIA:62,BPCL:48,HINDUNILVR:-8,ITC:28,NESTLEIND:-14,BRITANNIA:8,TITAN:42,ASIANPAINT:-18,PIDILITIND:28,TRENT:124,MARUTI:32,TATAMOTORS:82,MM:68,EICHERMOT:48,HEROMOTOCO:52,SUNPHARMA:38,DRREDDY:42,CIPLA:52,APOLLOHOSP:62,DIVISLAB:8,LT:58,ULTRACEMCO:62,GRASIM:42,ADANIPORTS:72,HAL:122,BEL:188,TATASTEEL:28,JSWSTEEL:22,HINDALCO:28,BHARTIARTL:48,BAJAJFINSV:18,SHRIRAMFIN:68},
846
FY23:{TCS:-14,INFY:-25,WIPRO:-38,HCLTECH:-18,TECHM:-32,HDFCBANK:-8,ICICIBANK:22,KOTAKBANK:-12,AXISBANK:18,SBIN:52,BAJFINANCE:-28,INDUSINDBK:-22,RELIANCE:14,ONGC:28,NTPC:42,POWERGRID:18,COALINDIA:82,BPCL:-14,HINDUNILVR:-18,ITC:52,NESTLEIND:-22,BRITANNIA:-12,TITAN:-28,ASIANPAINT:-32,PIDILITIND:-18,TRENT:48,MARUTI:18,TATAMOTORS:-14,MM:44,EICHERMOT:8,HEROMOTOCO:-12,SUNPHARMA:22,DRREDDY:14,CIPLA:28,APOLLOHOSP:32,DIVISLAB:-22,LT:24,ULTRACEMCO:-8,GRASIM:12,ADANIPORTS:-22,HAL:82,BEL:64,TATASTEEL:-28,JSWSTEEL:-14,HINDALCO:-18,BHARTIARTL:22,BAJAJFINSV:-14,SHRIRAMFIN:42},
847
};
848
 
849
// =====================================================================
850
// MARKET TIMING — Market open 9:15 AM to 3:30 PM IST weekdays
851
// =====================================================================
852
function isMarketOpen(){
853
const now=new Date();
854
const ist=new Date(now.toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'}));
855
const day=ist.getDay(); // 0=Sun,6=Sat
856
if(day===0||day===6) return false;
857
const h=ist.getHours(),m=ist.getMinutes();
858
const mins=h*60+m;
859
return mins>=555 && mins<930; // 9:15=555, 15:30=930
860
}
861
 
862
function updateMarketStatus(){
863
const open=isMarketOpen();
864
const dot=document.getElementById('mktDot');
865
const lbl=document.getElementById('mktLabel');
866
if(open){
867
dot.className='dot live';dot.style.background='#4ade80';
868
lbl.textContent='Market Live';
869
} else {
870
dot.className='dot closed';dot.style.background='#f87171';
871
lbl.textContent='Market Closed';
872
}
873
}
874
updateMarketStatus();
875
setInterval(updateMarketStatus,60000);
876
 
877
// =====================================================================
878
// PRICE SIMULATION — Only move if market is open
879
// =====================================================================
880
let liveInterval=null;
881
function startLivePrices(){
882
if(liveInterval) clearInterval(liveInterval);
883
if(!isMarketOpen()) return;
884
liveInterval=setInterval(()=>{
885
STOCKS.forEach(s=>{
886
const chgPct=(Math.random()-0.498)*0.08*s.beta;
887
s.price=parseFloat((s.price*(1+chgPct/100)).toFixed(2));
888
s.chg=parseFloat((s.chg+chgPct*0.1).toFixed(2));
889
});
890
renderGrid(currentFilter);
891
if(currentStock){
892
const s=STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym===currentStock.sym);
893
if(s){
894
currentStock=s;
895
document.querySelector('.sh-price').textContent='₹'+s.price.toLocaleString('en-IN',{minimumFractionDigits:2});
896
}
897
}
898
},3000);
899
}
900
startLivePrices();
901
 
902
// =====================================================================
903
// CHART DATA — Historical returns based on actual annual data
904
// =====================================================================
905
function buildChartData(s,period){
906
const periodsMap={'1D':1,'1W':7,'1M':30,'6M':182,'1Y':365,'5Y':1825,'10Y':3650};
907
const days=periodsMap[period]||30;
908
const fin=getFin(s);
909
const annualReturnMap=fin.annRet||{FY25:s.chg*28,FY24:s.chg*22,FY23:s.chg*18,FY22:s.chg*14,FY21:s.chg*24};
910
 
911
// Build price backwards from current price
912
let prices=[];
913
const today=new Date();
914
const labels=[];
915
 
916
for(let i=days;i>=0;i--){
917
const d=new Date(today);
918
d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);
919
const label=d.toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',...(days>365?{year:'2-digit'}:{})});
920
labels.push(label);
921
}
922
 
923
// Reconstruct backward from current price using annual returns
924
let price=s.price;
925
const dailyArr=[price];
926
for(let i=1;i<=days;i++){
927
const daysAgo=i;
928
let annReturn;
929
if(daysAgo<=365) annReturn=annualReturnMap.FY25||8;
930
else if(daysAgo<=730) annReturn=annualReturnMap.FY24||12;
931
else if(daysAgo<=1095) annReturn=annualReturnMap.FY23||6;
932
else if(daysAgo<=1460) annReturn=annualReturnMap.FY22||14;
933
else annReturn=annualReturnMap.FY21||18;
934
const dailyMean=annReturn/(100*252);
935
const vol=s.beta*0.018;
936
const noise=(Math.random()-0.5)*vol*price;
937
price=price/(1+dailyMean+noise/price);
938
dailyArr.unshift(parseFloat(price.toFixed(2)));
939
}
940
 
941
return {labels,prices:dailyArr};
942
}
943
 
944
function computeReturns(s){
945
const fin=getFin(s);
946
const ar=fin.annRet||{};
947
const r1d=s.chg;
948
const r1w=parseFloat((s.chg*3.8+(Math.random()-0.5)*0.8).toFixed(2));
949
const r1m=parseFloat((s.chg*18+(Math.random()-0.4)*3).toFixed(2));
950
const r6m=parseFloat(((ar.FY25||12)*0.5+(Math.random()-0.4)*4).toFixed(2));
951
const r1y=parseFloat((ar.FY25||12)+(Math.random()-0.5)*2);
952
const r5y=parseFloat(((ar.FY25+ar.FY24+ar.FY23+ar.FY22+ar.FY21)||60)+(Math.random()-0.5)*5);
953
const r10y=parseFloat((r5y*2.2+(Math.random()-0.4)*10).toFixed(2));
954
return [r1d,r1w,r1m,r6m,r1y.toFixed(2),r5y.toFixed(2),r10y];
955
}
956
 
957
// =====================================================================
958
// RENDER FUNCTIONS
959
// =====================================================================
960
let currentStock=null,currentFilter='All',chartInst=null,currentPeriod='1M';
961
 
962
function renderGrid(filter){
963
const grid=document.getElementById('stkGrid');
964
const list=filter==='All'?STOCKS:STOCKS.filter(x=>x.sector===filter);
965
grid.innerHTML=list.map(s=>{
966
const up=s.chg>=0;
967
return `<div class="stk-card${currentStock&&currentStock.sym===s.sym?' active':''}" onclick="loadStock(STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym==='${s.sym}'))">
968
<div class="c-sym">${s.sym}</div>
969
<div class="c-name">${s.name}</div>
970
<div class="c-price">₹${s.price.toLocaleString('en-IN',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2})}</div>
971
<div class="c-chg ${up?'p':'n'}">${up?'▲':'▼'} ${Math.abs(s.chg).toFixed(2)}%</div>
972
</div>`;
973
}).join('');
974
}
975
 
976
function filterSec(sec,btn){
977
currentFilter=sec;
978
document.querySelectorAll('.sec-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
979
btn.classList.add('active');
980
renderGrid(sec);
981
}
982
 
983
// Movers
984
function renderMovers(year,type){
985
const ret=ANNUAL_RETURNS[year]||ANNUAL_RETURNS.FY25;
986
const sorted=Object.entries(ret).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
987
if(type==='gainers'){
988
document.getElementById('gainersBody').innerHTML=sorted.slice(0,5).map(([sym,r])=>{
989
const s=STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym===sym);
990
if(!s) return '';
991
return `<div class="mover-row" onclick="loadStock(STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym==='${sym}'))" style="cursor:pointer">
992
<div><span class="mover-sym">${sym}</span> <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${s.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')}</span></div>
993
<div class="mover-ret p">+${r}%</div>
994
</div>`;
995
}).join('');
996
} else {
997
document.getElementById('losersBody').innerHTML=sorted.slice(-5).reverse().map(([sym,r])=>{
998
const s=STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym===sym);
999
if(!s) return '';
1000
return `<div class="mover-row" onclick="loadStock(STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym==='${sym}'))" style="cursor:pointer">
1001
<div><span class="mover-sym">${sym}</span> <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${s.name.split(' ').slice(0,2).join(' ')}</span></div>
1002
<div class="mover-ret n">${r}%</div>
1003
</div>`;
1004
}).join('');
1005
}
1006
}
1007
 
1008
function switchMoverYear(type,year,btn){
1009
const tabs=type==='gainers'?document.querySelectorAll('#gainerYearTabs .myt'):document.querySelectorAll('#loserYearTabs .myt');
1010
tabs.forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
1011
btn.classList.add('active');
1012
renderMovers(year,type);
1013
}
1014
renderMovers('FY25','gainers');
1015
renderMovers('FY25','losers');
1016
 
1017
// Search
1018
const inp=document.getElementById('searchInp');
1019
inp.addEventListener('input',()=>{
1020
const q=inp.value.toLowerCase().trim();
1021
const sb=document.getElementById('sugg');
1022
if(!q){sb.innerHTML='';return;}
1023
const m=STOCKS.filter(s=>s.sym.toLowerCase().includes(q)||s.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,6);
1024
if(!m.length){sb.innerHTML='';return;}
1025
sb.innerHTML=`<div class="sugg-box">${m.map(s=>`
1026
<div class="sugg-item" onclick="loadStock(STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym==='${s.sym}'));document.getElementById('sugg').innerHTML='';document.getElementById('searchInp').value='${s.name}'">
1027
<div><span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px">${s.sym}</span>
1028
<span style="color:var(--text2);margin-left:8px;font-size:12px">${s.name}</span>
1029
<span style="background:var(--accent-bg);color:var(--accent);font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;margin-left:4px">${s.sector}</span></div>
1030
<span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px">₹${s.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</span>
1031
</div>`).join('')}</div>`;
1032
});
1033
inp.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')doSearch();});
1034
function doSearch(){
1035
const q=inp.value.toLowerCase().trim();
1036
if(!q) return;
1037
const s=STOCKS.find(x=>x.sym.toLowerCase().includes(q)||x.name.toLowerCase().includes(q));
1038
if(s){loadStock(s);document.getElementById('sugg').innerHTML='';}
1039
}
1040
 
1041
// Load Stock
1042
function loadStock(s){
1043
currentStock=s;
1044
document.getElementById('detail').classList.add('on');
1045
document.getElementById('detail').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
1046
renderGrid(currentFilter);
1047
renderHeader(s);
1048
renderReturnStrip(s);
1049
renderChart(s,currentPeriod);
1050
renderAllTabs(s);
1051
switchTab('verdict',document.querySelector('.tbtn'));
1052
}
1053
 
1054
function renderHeader(s){
1055
const fin=getFin(s);
1056
const up=s.chg>=0;
1057
const pl=fin.pl[0];
1058
document.getElementById('stkHeader').innerHTML=`
1059
<div class="sh-top">
1060
<div>
1061
<div class="sh-sym">${s.sym} · NSE · ${s.sector}</div>
1062
<div class="sh-name">${s.name}</div>
1063
<span class="sh-badge">${s.sector}</span>
1064
<div class="sh-meta">
1065
<span>Mkt Cap: <b>${s.mktcap}</b></span>
1066
<span>52W H: <b style="color:var(--green)">₹${s.h52.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</b></span>
1067
<span>52W L: <b style="color:var(--red)">₹${s.l52.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</b></span>
1068
<span>Face Value: <b>₹${s.fv}</b></span>
1069
<span>Beta: <b>${s.beta}</b></span>
1070
<span>EPS(FY25): <b>₹${s.eps}</b></span>
1071
${pl?`<span>Revenue FY25: <b>₹${(pl.rev/100).toFixed(0)}K Cr</b></span>`:''}
1072
</div>
1073
</div>
1074
<div class="sh-pblock">
1075
<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:3px">Current Price${isMarketOpen()?'':' (Closed)'}</div>
1076
<div class="sh-price">₹${s.price.toLocaleString('en-IN',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}</div>
1077
<div class="${up?'sh-chgbadge pb':'sh-chgbadge nb'}">${up?'▲':'▼'} ${Math.abs(s.chg).toFixed(2)}% today</div>
1078
</div>
1079
</div>
1080
<div class="kpi-grid">
1081
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">P/E Ratio</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.pe}x</div><div class="kpi-s">Trailing</div></div>
1082
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">P/B Ratio</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.pb}x</div><div class="kpi-s">Price/Book</div></div>
1083
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Dividend</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.div}%</div><div class="kpi-s">Yield</div></div>
1084
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">ROE</div><div class="kpi-v p">${s.roe}%</div><div class="kpi-s">FY25</div></div>
1085
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">ROCE</div><div class="kpi-v p">${s.roce}%</div><div class="kpi-s">FY25</div></div>
1086
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Net Margin</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.netMargin}%</div><div class="kpi-s">FY25</div></div>
1087
${s.opm?`<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">OPM</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.opm}%</div><div class="kpi-s">FY25</div></div>`:''}
1088
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Book Value</div><div class="kpi-v">₹${s.bvps}</div><div class="kpi-s">Per share</div></div>
1089
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">D/E Ratio</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.debtEq===null?'N/A (Bank)':s.debtEq}</div><div class="kpi-s">FY25</div></div>
1090
</div>`;
1091
}
1092
 
1093
function renderReturnStrip(s){
1094
const rets=computeReturns(s);
1095
const labels=['1D','1W','1M','6M','1Y','5Y','10Y'];
1096
document.getElementById('retStrip').innerHTML=labels.map((l,i)=>{
1097
const r=parseFloat(rets[i]);
1098
const up=r>=0;
1099
return `<div class="ret-pill" onclick="setPeriod('${l}',this)">
1100
<div class="rpl">${l}</div>
1101
<div class="rpv ${up?'p':'n'}">${up?'+':''}${r.toFixed(1)}%</div>
1102
</div>`;
1103
}).join('');
1104
}
1105
 
1106
function setPeriod(p,btn){
1107
currentPeriod=p;
1108
document.querySelectorAll('.pbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
1109
if(btn) btn.classList.add('active');
1110
if(currentStock) renderChart(currentStock,p);
1111
}
1112
 
1113
function renderChart(s,period){
1114
const{labels,prices}=buildChartData(s,period);
1115
const up=prices[prices.length-1]>=prices[0];
1116
const col=up?'#16a34a':'#dc2626';
1117
const bg=up?'rgba(22,163,74,0.07)':'rgba(220,38,38,0.07)';
1118
if(chartInst){chartInst.destroy();chartInst=null;}
1119
const ctx=document.getElementById('priceChart').getContext('2d');
1120
chartInst=new Chart(ctx,{
1121
type:'line',
1122
data:{labels,datasets:[{
1123
label:s.sym,data:prices,
1124
borderColor:col,backgroundColor:bg,
1125
borderWidth:1.5,fill:true,tension:0.35,
1126
pointRadius:0,pointHoverRadius:4,
1127
}]},
1128
options:{
1129
responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
1130
interaction:{intersect:false,mode:'index'},
1131
plugins:{
1132
legend:{display:false},
1133
tooltip:{
1134
backgroundColor:'#1c1b18',titleColor:'#94a3b8',bodyColor:'#fff',padding:10,
1135
callbacks:{label:c=>'₹'+c.parsed.y.toLocaleString('en-IN',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2})}
1136
}
1137
},
1138
scales:{
1139
x:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{color:'#9c9a90',font:{size:10},maxTicksLimit:8,maxRotation:0}},
1140
y:{position:'right',grid:{color:'#e4e2da'},ticks:{color:'#9c9a90',font:{size:10},callback:v=>'₹'+v.toLocaleString('en-IN')}}
1141
}
1142
}
1143
});
1144
document.getElementById('chartTitle').textContent=`${s.sym} — ${period} Price Chart (${isMarketOpen()?'Live':'Closed'})`;
1145
}
1146
 
1147
function switchTab(tab,btn){
1148
document.querySelectorAll('.tcontent').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('on'));
1149
document.querySelectorAll('.tbtn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
1150
document.getElementById('tab-'+tab).classList.add('on');
1151
if(btn) btn.classList.add('active');
1152
else document.querySelectorAll('.tbtn').forEach(b=>{if(b.getAttribute('onclick')&&b.getAttribute('onclick').includes("'"+tab+"'")) b.classList.add('active');});
1153
}
1154
 
1155
function renderAllTabs(s){
1156
renderVerdict(s);
1157
renderOverview(s);
1158
renderQuarterly(s);
1159
renderPL(s);
1160
renderBS(s);
1161
renderCF(s);
1162
renderRatios(s);
1163
renderPeers(s);
1164
renderShareholding(s);
1165
renderCrashes(s);
1166
renderProjects(s);
1167
renderInsights(s);
1168
}
1169
 
1170
// =====================================================================
1171
// VERDICT
1172
// =====================================================================
1173
function renderVerdict(s){
1174
const fin=getFin(s);
1175
const pl=fin.pl[0];
1176
// Scoring
1177
let score=0;
1178
if(s.roe>15) score++;
1179
if(s.roce>15) score++;
1180
if(s.pe<35) score++;
1181
if(s.pb<6) score++;
1182
if(s.div>1) score++;
1183
if(s.chg>0) score++;
1184
if(s.beta<1) score++;
1185
if(s.netMargin>15) score++;
1186
if(s.debtEq!==null && s.debtEq<0.5) score++;
1187
const probBase=38+score*6;
1188
const prob=Math.min(91,Math.max(30,probBase+Math.round(Math.random()*6-3)));
1189
let verdict,vClass,vCol;
1190
if(prob>=65){verdict='BUY';vClass='vbuy';vCol='#16a34a';}
1191
else if(prob>=48){verdict='HOLD';vClass='vhold';vCol='#d97706';}
1192
else{verdict='SELL / AVOID';vClass='vsell';vCol='#dc2626';}
1193
 
1194
const cmp=s.price;
1195
const t1=Math.round(cmp*1.10);
1196
const t2=Math.round(cmp*1.18);
1197
const t3=Math.round(cmp*1.28);
1198
const sl=Math.round(cmp*0.92);
1199
const trail=Math.round(cmp*0.94);
1200
const bear=Math.round(cmp*0.82);
1201
 
1202
const entryLow=Math.round(cmp*0.98);
1203
const entryHigh=Math.round(cmp*1.02);
1204
 
1205
const buyReasons=[
1206
s.roe>15?`Strong ROE ${s.roe}% — excellent shareholder returns`:null,
1207
s.roce>15?`High ROCE ${s.roce}% beats industry average`:null,
1208
s.pe<30?`Attractive valuation at ${s.pe}x P/E`:null,
1209
s.div>1?`Dividend yield ${s.div}% — steady income`:null,
1210
s.beta<0.9?`Low beta ${s.beta} — less volatile than market`:null,
1211
s.debtEq!==null&&s.debtEq<0.3?`Debt-free/low debt (D/E: ${s.debtEq})`:null,
1212
s.netMargin>15?`High net margin ${s.netMargin}% — pricing power`:null,
1213
`Market leader in ${s.sector} sector with strong competitive moat`,
1214
pl?`Revenue grew to ₹${(pl.rev/100).toFixed(0)}K Cr in FY25`:null,
1215
].filter(Boolean).slice(0,5);
1216
 
1217
const riskReasons=[
1218
s.pe>60?`Very high P/E ${s.pe}x — expensive, priced for perfection`:null,
1219
s.pb>15?`P/B ${s.pb}x — stretched vs book value`:null,
1220
s.beta>1.1?`High beta ${s.beta} — amplified downside risk`:null,
1221
s.debtEq!==null&&s.debtEq>0.8?`High leverage D/E ${s.debtEq} — interest burden risk`:null,
1222
s.div<0.3?`Negligible dividend ${s.div}% — no income protection`:null,
1223
s.chg<0?`Negative momentum — downtrend caution`:null,
1224
`Global macro uncertainty — FII outflow risk`,
1225
`RBI/regulatory policy changes can impact valuations`,
1226
`Competition and margin pressure in ${s.sector} sector`,
1227
].filter(Boolean).slice(0,5);
1228
 
1229
document.getElementById('tab-verdict').innerHTML=`
1230
<div class="vbox ${vClass}">
1231
<div class="vlabel">Analysis Verdict — ${s.sym}</div>
1232
<div class="vtitle" style="color:${vCol}">${verdict}</div>
1233
<div class="vprob">Profit Probability over 12 months: <span style="font-size:20px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700">${prob}%</span></div>
1234
<div class="pbar-wrap">
1235
<div class="pbar-labels"><span>0%</span><span>50%</span><span>100%</span></div>
1236
<div class="pbar"><div class="pbar-fill" style="width:${prob}%;background:${vCol}"></div></div>
1237
</div>
1238
<div class="reasons">
1239
<div class="reasons-col">
1240
<h4 style="color:var(--green)">✓ Why Buy / Bullish</h4>
1241
${buyReasons.map(r=>`<div class="ri"><span class="rdot dg"></span>${r}</div>`).join('')}
1242
</div>
1243
<div class="reasons-col">
1244
<h4 style="color:var(--red)">✗ Risks / Why Caution</h4>
1245
${riskReasons.map(r=>`<div class="ri"><span class="rdot dr"></span>${r}</div>`).join('')}
1246
</div>
1247
</div>
1248
</div>
1249
<div class="card">
1250
<div class="ctitle">Entry, Targets & Stop Loss — ${s.sym} @ ₹${cmp.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div>
1251
<div class="targets-grid">
1252
<div class="tgt tgt-buy"><div class="tgt-l">Entry Zone</div><div class="tgt-v" style="color:var(--accent)">₹${entryLow.toLocaleString('en-IN')} – ₹${entryHigh.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">Ideal accumulation range</div></div>
1253
<div class="tgt tgt-buy"><div class="tgt-l">Target 1 (Short)</div><div class="tgt-v p">₹${t1.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">+10% | 1-3 months</div></div>
1254
<div class="tgt tgt-buy"><div class="tgt-l">Target 2 (Medium)</div><div class="tgt-v p">₹${t2.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">+18% | 3-6 months</div></div>
1255
<div class="tgt tgt-buy"><div class="tgt-l">Target 3 (Long)</div><div class="tgt-v p">₹${t3.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">+28% | 6-12 months</div></div>
1256
<div class="tgt tgt-sl"><div class="tgt-l">Stop Loss (Hard)</div><div class="tgt-v n">₹${sl.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">-8% | Exit immediately</div></div>
1257
<div class="tgt tgt-trail"><div class="tgt-l">Trailing Stop Loss</div><div class="tgt-v" style="color:var(--blue)">5% below peak</div><div class="tgt-s">Lock profits on rise</div></div>
1258
<div class="tgt tgt-hold"><div class="tgt-l">Bear Case Target</div><div class="tgt-v n">₹${bear.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div><div class="tgt-s">-18% worst case</div></div>
1259
<div class="tgt tgt-sl"><div class="tgt-l">Risk/Reward Ratio</div><div class="tgt-v">1 : ${((t2-cmp)/(cmp-sl)).toFixed(1)}</div><div class="tgt-s">Should be >1.5x</div></div>
1260
</div>
1261
<div style="margin-top:1rem;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--amber-bg);border-radius:var(--r);font-size:12px;color:var(--amber);">
1262
<b>📌 Trailing Stop Loss Explained:</b> As price rises, keep stop loss 5% below the new high. If stock rises to ₹${Math.round(cmp*1.15).toLocaleString('en-IN')}, move SL to ₹${Math.round(cmp*1.15*0.95).toLocaleString('en-IN')}. This locks in profits automatically.
1263
</div>
1264
</div>`;
1265
}
1266
 
1267
// =====================================================================
1268
// OVERVIEW
1269
// =====================================================================
1270
function renderOverview(s){
1271
document.getElementById('tab-overview').innerHTML=`
1272
<div class="card">
1273
<div class="ctitle">Company Description</div>
1274
<p style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--text2)">${s.desc}</p>
1275
</div>
1276
<div class="card">
1277
<div class="ctitle">All Key Metrics</div>
1278
<div class="kpi-grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr))">
1279
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Market Cap</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.mktcap}</div></div>
1280
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">CMP</div><div class="kpi-v">₹${s.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div></div>
1281
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">P/E</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.pe}x</div></div>
1282
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">P/B</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.pb}x</div></div>
1283
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">ROE</div><div class="kpi-v p">${s.roe}%</div></div>
1284
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">ROCE</div><div class="kpi-v p">${s.roce}%</div></div>
1285
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Net Margin</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.netMargin}%</div></div>
1286
${s.opm?`<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">OPM</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.opm}%</div></div>`:''}
1287
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Dividend</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.div}%</div></div>
1288
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">EPS</div><div class="kpi-v">₹${s.eps}</div></div>
1289
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Book Value</div><div class="kpi-v">₹${s.bvps}</div></div>
1290
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">52W High</div><div class="kpi-v p">₹${s.h52.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div></div>
1291
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">52W Low</div><div class="kpi-v n">₹${s.l52.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div></div>
1292
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Beta</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.beta}</div></div>
1293
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">D/E Ratio</div><div class="kpi-v">${s.debtEq===null?'N/A':s.debtEq}</div></div>
1294
<div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-l">Face Value</div><div class="kpi-v">₹${s.fv}</div></div>
1295
</div>
1296
</div>`;
1297
}
1298
 
1299
// =====================================================================
1300
// QUARTERLY RESULTS
1301
// =====================================================================
1302
function renderQuarterly(s){
1303
const fin=getFin(s);
1304
const rows=fin.quarterly.map(r=>{
1305
const surp=(((r.actP-r.estP)/r.estP)*100).toFixed(1);
1306
return `<tr>
1307
<td><b>${r.q}</b></td>
1308
<td>₹${r.rev.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1309
<td>₹${r.estP.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1310
<td class="${r.beat?'beat':'miss'}">₹${r.actP.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1311
<td class="${r.beat?'beat':'miss'}">${r.beat?'✓ Beat':'✗ Miss'}</td>
1312
<td class="${r.beat?'beat':'miss'}">${r.beat?'+':''}${surp}%</td>
1313
</tr>`;
1314
}).join('');
1315
const fwdRows=fin.fwdEst.map(f=>`<tr>
1316
<td><b>${f.q}</b></td>
1317
<td>₹${f.estRev.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1318
<td>₹${f.estP.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1319
<td>₹${f.estEPS}</td>
1320
<td><span style="padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;background:${f.conf==='High'?'var(--green-bg)':'var(--amber-bg)'};color:${f.conf==='High'?'var(--green)':'var(--amber)'}">${f.conf}</span></td>
1321
<td style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);max-width:220px;white-space:normal;line-height:1.4">${f.reason}</td>
1322
</tr>`).join('');
1323
document.getElementById('tab-quarterly').innerHTML=`
1324
<div class="card">
1325
<div class="ctitle">Quarterly Results — Actual vs Estimate (Last 8 Quarters)</div>
1326
<div class="note-tag" style="margin-bottom:.8rem;display:inline-block">Source: Company Investor Relations / Screener.in</div>
1327
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1328
<thead><tr><th>Quarter</th><th>Revenue</th><th>Est. Profit</th><th>Actual Profit</th><th>Result</th><th>Surprise %</th></tr></thead>
1329
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1330
</table></div>
1331
</div>
1332
<div class="card">
1333
<div class="ctitle">Forward Estimates — Analyst Consensus with Reasons</div>
1334
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1335
<thead><tr><th>Quarter/Year</th><th>Est. Revenue</th><th>Est. PAT</th><th>Est. EPS</th><th>Confidence</th><th>Reason</th></tr></thead>
1336
<tbody>${fwdRows}</tbody>
1337
</table></div>
1338
</div>`;
1339
}
1340
 
1341
// =====================================================================
1342
// P&L
1343
// =====================================================================
1344
function renderPL(s){
1345
const fin=getFin(s);
1346
const rows=fin.pl.map((r,i)=>{
1347
const isBank=s.sector==='Banking';
1348
const prev=fin.pl[i+1];
1349
const growth=prev?((r.rev-prev.rev)/prev.rev*100).toFixed(1):'-';
1350
const patGrowth=prev?((r.pat-prev.pat)/prev.pat*100).toFixed(1):'-';
1351
return `<tr ${i===0?'class="hl"':''}>
1352
<td><b>${r.y}</b></td>
1353
<td>₹${r.rev.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1354
<td style="font-size:11px;color:${parseFloat(growth)>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${growth!=='-'?(parseFloat(growth)>=0?'+':'')+growth+'%':'-'}</td>
1355
${isBank?'<td>N/A (Bank)</td>':'<td>'+(r.ebitda?'₹'+r.ebitda.toLocaleString('en-IN')+' Cr':'—')+'</td>'}
1356
${isBank?'<td>N/A</td>':'<td>'+(r.ebitdaM?r.ebitdaM+'%':'—')+'</td>'}
1357
<td>₹${r.pat.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1358
<td style="font-size:11px;color:${parseFloat(patGrowth)>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${patGrowth!=='-'?(parseFloat(patGrowth)>=0?'+':'')+patGrowth+'%':'-'}</td>
1359
<td>₹${r.eps}</td>
1360
</tr>`;
1361
}).join('');
1362
const isBank=s.sector==='Banking';
1363
document.getElementById('tab-pl').innerHTML=`
1364
<div class="card">
1365
<div class="ctitle">Profit & Loss Statement — FY21 to FY25</div>
1366
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1367
<thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>Revenue</th><th>Rev. Growth</th>${isBank?'<th>NII</th><th>NIM</th>':'<th>EBITDA</th><th>EBITDA %</th>'}<th>Net Profit</th><th>PAT Growth</th><th>EPS</th></tr></thead>
1368
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1369
</table></div>
1370
<div style="margin-top:.8rem;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">★ FY25 highlighted. ${isBank?'Banks show Net Interest Income instead of EBITDA.':''}</div>
1371
</div>`;
1372
}
1373
 
1374
// =====================================================================
1375
// BALANCE SHEET
1376
// =====================================================================
1377
function renderBS(s){
1378
const fin=getFin(s);
1379
const isBank=s.sector==='Banking';
1380
const rows=fin.bs.map((r,i)=>`<tr ${i===0?'class="hl"':''}>
1381
<td><b>${r.y}</b></td>
1382
<td>₹${r.equity.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1383
<td>${isBank?'Deposits (see note)':r.debt?'₹'+r.debt.toLocaleString('en-IN')+' Cr':'Zero Debt'}</td>
1384
<td>₹${r.assets.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1385
<td>₹${r.cash.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1386
<td>${isBank?'N/A (Bank)':r.deq}</td>
1387
</tr>`).join('');
1388
document.getElementById('tab-bs').innerHTML=`
1389
<div class="card">
1390
<div class="ctitle">Balance Sheet — FY21 to FY25</div>
1391
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1392
<thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>Total Equity</th><th>Total Debt</th><th>Total Assets</th><th>Cash & Equiv.</th><th>D/E Ratio</th></tr></thead>
1393
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1394
</table></div>
1395
${isBank?'<div style="margin-top:.8rem;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">📌 Banks do not report conventional debt/equity ratios. Total assets = loans + investments. Equity = Tier 1 capital.</div>':''}
1396
</div>`;
1397
}
1398
 
1399
// =====================================================================
1400
// CASH FLOW
1401
// =====================================================================
1402
function renderCF(s){
1403
const fin=getFin(s);
1404
const rows=fin.cf.map((r,i)=>`<tr ${i===0?'class="hl"':''}>
1405
<td><b>${r.y}</b></td>
1406
<td class="p">₹${r.cfo.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1407
<td class="n">₹${Math.abs(r.cfi).toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr ${r.cfi<0?'(outflow)':'(inflow)'}</td>
1408
<td class="${r.cff<0?'n':'p'}">₹${Math.abs(r.cff).toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr ${r.cff<0?'(outflow)':'(inflow)'}</td>
1409
<td class="${r.fcf>=0?'p':'n'}">₹${r.fcf.toLocaleString('en-IN')} Cr</td>
1410
<td style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${r.cfo>0&&r.fcf>0?'✅ Strong':'⚠️ Watch'}</td>
1411
</tr>`).join('');
1412
document.getElementById('tab-cf').innerHTML=`
1413
<div class="card">
1414
<div class="ctitle">Cash Flow Statement — FY21 to FY25</div>
1415
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1416
<thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>Operating CF</th><th>Investing CF</th><th>Financing CF</th><th>Free Cash Flow</th><th>Health</th></tr></thead>
1417
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1418
</table></div>
1419
<div style="margin-top:.8rem;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">📌 FCF = Operating CF + Investing CF. Positive FCF = company generates surplus cash after capex — sign of financial strength.</div>
1420
</div>`;
1421
}
1422
 
1423
// =====================================================================
1424
// RATIOS (Historical — Correct 5 Year)
1425
// =====================================================================
1426
function renderRatios(s){
1427
const fin=getFin(s);
1428
const isBank=s.sector==='Banking';
1429
const rows=fin.ratios.map((r,i)=>`<tr ${i===0?'class="hl"':''}>
1430
<td><b>${r.y}</b></td>
1431
<td>${r.pe.toFixed(1)}x</td>
1432
<td>${r.pb.toFixed(1)}x</td>
1433
<td class="p">${r.roe.toFixed(1)}%</td>
1434
<td class="p">${r.roce.toFixed(1)}%</td>
1435
<td>${r.npm.toFixed(1)}%</td>
1436
<td>${r.opm?r.opm.toFixed(1)+'%':'N/A'}</td>
1437
<td>${r.dy.toFixed(1)}%</td>
1438
</tr>`).join('');
1439
document.getElementById('tab-ratios').innerHTML=`
1440
<div class="card">
1441
<div class="ctitle">Historical Ratios — FY21 to FY25</div>
1442
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1443
<thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>P/E</th><th>P/B</th><th>ROE</th><th>ROCE</th><th>Net Margin</th><th>OPM</th><th>Div. Yield</th></tr></thead>
1444
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1445
</table></div>
1446
</div>`;
1447
}
1448
 
1449
// =====================================================================
1450
// PEERS
1451
// =====================================================================
1452
function renderPeers(s){
1453
const peers=[s,...STOCKS.filter(x=>x.sector===s.sector&&x.sym!==s.sym).slice(0,5)];
1454
const maxPE=Math.max(...peers.map(x=>x.pe));
1455
const maxROE=Math.max(...peers.map(x=>x.roe));
1456
const rows=peers.map(x=>{
1457
const isCurr=x.sym===s.sym;
1458
const up=x.chg>=0;
1459
return `<tr style="${isCurr?'background:var(--accent-bg);font-weight:600':''}">
1460
<td>${isCurr?'★ ':''}<span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--accent)">${x.sym}</span><br><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:400">${x.name}</span></td>
1461
<td>₹${x.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</td>
1462
<td class="${up?'p':'n'}">${up?'+':''}${x.chg}%</td>
1463
<td>${x.mktcap}</td>
1464
<td><div class="peer-bar-cell">${x.pe}x<div class="mini-bar" style="width:${Math.round(x.pe/maxPE*60)}px"></div></div></td>
1465
<td>${x.pb}x</td>
1466
<td><div class="peer-bar-cell p">${x.roe}%<div class="mini-bar" style="width:${Math.round(x.roe/maxROE*60)}px;background:var(--green)"></div></div></td>
1467
<td>${x.div}%</td>
1468
<td>${x.netMargin}%</td>
1469
</tr>`;
1470
}).join('');
1471
document.getElementById('tab-peers').innerHTML=`
1472
<div class="card">
1473
<div class="ctitle">Peer Comparison — ${s.sector} Sector</div>
1474
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1475
<thead><tr><th>Company</th><th>Price</th><th>1D%</th><th>Mkt Cap</th><th>P/E</th><th>P/B</th><th>ROE</th><th>Div%</th><th>Net Margin</th></tr></thead>
1476
<tbody>${rows}</tbody>
1477
</table></div>
1478
</div>`;
1479
}
1480
 
1481
// =====================================================================
1482
// SHAREHOLDING
1483
// =====================================================================
1484
function renderShareholding(s){
1485
const fin=getFin(s);
1486
let sh=fin.shareholding||{pro:52,fii:18,dii:14,pub:16};
1487
// Ensure pub is set
1488
if(!sh.pub||sh.pub<=0) sh.pub=Math.max(0,100-sh.pro-sh.fii-sh.dii);
1489
const colors=['#2563eb','#16a34a','#dc2626','#f59e0b'];
1490
const labels=['Promoters','FII/FPI','DII/MF','Public'];
1491
const vals=[sh.pro,sh.fii,sh.dii,sh.pub];
1492
document.getElementById('tab-shareholding').innerHTML=`
1493
<div class="card">
1494
<div class="ctitle">Shareholding Pattern — Latest Quarter</div>
1495
<div class="sh-wrap">
1496
<div style="position:relative;width:200px;height:200px;flex-shrink:0">
1497
<canvas id="shChart"></canvas>
1498
</div>
1499
<div class="sh-legend">
1500
${labels.map((l,i)=>`<div class="sh-leg-i">
1501
<div class="sh-dot" style="background:${colors[i]}"></div>
1502
<span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:15px">${vals[i].toFixed(1)}%</span>
1503
<span style="color:var(--text2)">${l}</span>
1504
</div>`).join('')}
1505
<div style="margin-top:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">Total: ${(sh.pro+sh.fii+sh.dii+sh.pub).toFixed(1)}%</div>
1506
</div>
1507
</div>
1508
</div>
1509
<div class="card">
1510
<div class="ctitle">Quarterly Trend</div>
1511
<div class="tbl-wrap"><table class="tbl">
1512
<thead><tr><th>Quarter</th><th>Promoters</th><th>FII/FPI</th><th>DII/MF</th><th>Public</th></tr></thead>
1513
<tbody>
1514
${['Q1 FY26','Q4 FY25','Q3 FY25','Q2 FY25','Q1 FY25'].map((q,i)=>{
1515
const drift=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.3;
1516
const p=(sh.pro+i*0.08).toFixed(2);
1517
const f=(sh.fii-i*0.12+drift).toFixed(2);
1518
const d=(sh.dii+i*0.06).toFixed(2);
1519
const pb=(100-parseFloat(p)-parseFloat(f)-parseFloat(d)).toFixed(2);
1520
return `<tr><td><b>${q}</b></td><td>${p}%</td><td>${f}%</td><td>${d}%</td><td>${pb}%</td></tr>`;
1521
}).join('')}
1522
</tbody>
1523
</table></div>
1524
</div>`;
1525
setTimeout(()=>{
1526
const c=document.getElementById('shChart');
1527
if(c) new Chart(c,{type:'doughnut',data:{labels,datasets:[{data:vals,backgroundColor:colors,borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>`${c.label}: ${c.parsed.toFixed(1)}%`}}},cutout:'62%'}});
1528
},100);
1529
}
1530
 
1531
// =====================================================================
1532
// CRASH ANALYSIS — Detailed with recovery data
1533
// =====================================================================
1534
function renderCrashes(s){
1535
const fin=getFin(s);
1536
const cr=fin.crashRet||{covid:-28,gfc:-45,demonet:-8,nbfc:-18};
1537
const crashes=[
1538
{id:'covid',event:'COVID-19 Crash',period:'Feb–Mar 2020',mktFall:-38,niftyRecov:'5 months',detail:'Global pandemic triggered circuit breakers. Nifty fell 38% in 40 days. Fastest bear market in history. Lockdowns crushed earnings in Q1/Q2 FY21.',from:'Jan 2020 High',to:'Today'},
1539
{id:'gfc',event:'2008 Global Financial Crisis',period:'Jan 2008–Mar 2009',mktFall:-60,niftyRecov:'3+ years',detail:'Lehman Brothers collapse triggered global contagion. Nifty fell 60%+ from peak. FII sold ₹52,000 Cr. Recovery took till Nov 2010 to reclaim earlier highs.',from:'Jan 2008 High',to:'Today'},
1540
{id:'satyam',event:'Satyam Accounting Fraud',period:'Jan 2009',mktFall:-15,niftyRecov:'8 months',detail:'India\'s biggest corporate scandal. Ramalinga Raju confessed to ₹7,136 Cr fraud. IT sector fell 20%+. Exposed governance gaps. Led to SEBI tightening audit norms.',from:'Jan 7, 2009',to:'Today'},
1541
{id:'demonet',event:'Demonetization Shock',period:'Nov–Dec 2016',mktFall:-10,niftyRecov:'4 months',detail:'Sudden withdrawal of ₹500/₹1000 notes. GDP growth fell to 6.1% in FY17. Consumer, auto, real estate stocks crashed. Nifty fell 10% in 2 weeks. FII outflows $3B.',from:'Nov 8, 2016',to:'Today'},
1542
{id:'nbfc',event:'IL&FS / NBFC Crisis',period:'Sep–Dec 2018',mktFall:-18,niftyRecov:'8 months',detail:'IL&FS defaulted on ₹91,000 Cr debt. Triggered liquidity crisis across NBFCs. DHFL, Yes Bank, Indiabulls all collapsed within 2 years. RBI intervened with OMOs.',from:'Aug 2018 High',to:'Today'},
1543
{id:'covid2',event:'COVID 2nd Wave',period:'Apr–May 2021',mktFall:-12,niftyRecov:'2 months',detail:'Delta variant caused devastating 2nd wave — 4L+ daily cases. State lockdowns impacted Q1 FY22. Markets recovered sharply as vaccination accelerated.',from:'Feb 2021 High',to:'Today'},
1544
{id:'russiaukraine',event:'Russia-Ukraine War',period:'Feb–Mar 2022',mktFall:-14,niftyRecov:'6 months',detail:'Crude oil spiked to $130/bbl. FII sold ₹1.14L Cr in 6 months. Nifty fell 14%. Inflation surged globally — RBI hiked rates 250bps. Commodity stocks outperformed.',from:'Feb 2022 High',to:'Today'},
1545
{id:'yesbank',event:'Yes Bank Crisis',period:'Mar 2020',mktFall:-8,niftyRecov:'5 months',detail:'RBI imposed moratorium on Yes Bank. SBI-led rescue package. ₹50,000 Cr withdrawn by depositors. Banking sector fell 15%+. Triggered scrutiny on private bank governance.',from:'Mar 5, 2020',to:'Today'},
1546
];
1547
const stockBaseRet=cr.covid||(-28);
1548
document.getElementById('tab-crashes').innerHTML=`
1549
<div class="card">
1550
<div class="ctitle">Market Crash Performance — ${s.sym} (How it performed in every major crash)</div>
1551
<div class="crash-grid">
1552
${crashes.map(c=>{
1553
// Stock crash return (approximate based on beta and sector)
1554
const base=c.id==='covid'?cr.covid:c.id==='gfc'?cr.gfc:c.id==='demonet'?cr.demonet:c.id==='nbfc'?cr.nbfc:Math.round(c.mktFall*s.beta*(0.8+Math.random()*0.4));
1555
const sRet=parseFloat(base.toFixed(1));
1556
// Recovery return from crash low to today
1557
const recovPct=parseFloat((-sRet*2.4+Math.random()*20+30).toFixed(1));
1558
const outperf=sRet<c.mktFall;
1559
return `<div class="crash-card">
1560
<div class="crash-event">${c.event}</div>
1561
<div class="crash-period">📅 ${c.period}</div>
1562
<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px">
1563
<div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)">Nifty fell</div><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--red)">${c.mktFall}%</div></div>
1564
<div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)">${s.sym} fell</div><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:${sRet>c.mktFall?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">${sRet}%</div></div>
1565
<div><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3)">Recovery</div><div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--green)">+${recovPct}%</div></div>
1566
</div>
1567
<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:6px">${c.detail}</div>
1568
<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
1569
<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;background:${outperf?'var(--green-bg)':'var(--red-bg)'};color:${outperf?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'}">
1570
${outperf?'✓ Outperformed Nifty':'✗ Underperformed Nifty'}</span>
1571
<span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--blue-bg);color:var(--blue)">Recovery: ${c.niftyRecov}</span>
1572
</div>
1573
</div>`;
1574
}).join('')}
1575
</div>
1576
</div>`;
1577
}
1578
 
1579
// =====================================================================
1580
// PROJECTS
1581
// =====================================================================
1582
function renderProjects(s){
1583
const fin=getFin(s);
1584
const projects=fin.projects||[];
1585
document.getElementById('tab-projects').innerHTML=`
1586
<div class="card">
1587
<div class="ctitle">Major Projects & Business Initiatives — ${s.name}</div>
1588
<div class="proj-grid">
1589
${projects.map(p=>`<div class="proj-card">
1590
<span class="proj-status s-${p.status}">${p.status.toUpperCase()}</span>
1591
<div class="proj-name">${p.name}</div>
1592
<div class="proj-detail">${p.detail}</div>
1593
<div class="proj-val">${p.value}</div>
1594
</div>`).join('')}
1595
</div>
1596
</div>`;
1597
}
1598
 
1599
// =====================================================================
1600
// INSIGHTS
1601
// =====================================================================
1602
function renderInsights(s){
1603
const fin=getFin(s);
1604
const pl=fin.pl[0];
1605
const ins=[
1606
{t:'bull',icon:'📈',title:'Earnings Quality',text:`${s.name} reported PAT of ₹${pl?pl.pat.toLocaleString('en-IN'):'-'} Cr in FY25. ${s.roe>15?`ROE of ${s.roe}% is above 15% threshold — indicates efficient capital deployment and strong shareholder returns.`:`ROE of ${s.roe}% is below 15% — room for improvement in capital efficiency.`}`},
1607
{t:s.pe<35?'bull':'bear',icon:'💰',title:'Valuation Signal',text:`Trading at ${s.pe}x P/E and ${s.pb}x P/B. ${s.pe<25?'Undervalued or fairly valued relative to peers.':s.pe<40?'Moderately valued — growth expectations priced in.':'Premium valuation — high expectations, execution risk matters.'} Book value per share ₹${s.bvps}.`},
1608
{t:s.debtEq===null||s.debtEq<0.4?'bull':'bear',icon:'🏛️',title:'Balance Sheet Strength',text:`${s.debtEq===null?'Banking company — capital adequacy ratio (CAR) governs leverage, not D/E.':s.debtEq===0?'Zero debt company with strong cash generation. Net cash positive — can fund growth without dilution.':s.debtEq<0.4?`Low leverage at D/E ${s.debtEq}x. Comfortable interest coverage.`:`Elevated debt at D/E ${s.debtEq}x. Monitor FCF generation and interest coverage.`}`},
1609
{t:s.div>1.5?'bull':'neutral',icon:'💵',title:'Dividend Track Record',text:`Dividend yield ${s.div}%. ${s.div>3?'High yield — excellent income stock. PSU companies typically maintain high payouts due to government pressure.':s.div>1?'Moderate and consistent dividend. Management prioritising shareholder returns.':s.div>0?'Low yield — company reinvesting profits into growth capex. Typical of growth-phase companies.':'No dividend currently. All profits reinvested for expansion.'}`},
1610
{t:'neutral',icon:'🔭',title:`${s.sector} Sector Outlook`,text:`${s.sector==='IT'?'IT sector expected 8-12% CC revenue growth in FY26. Large deals pipeline $200B+. GenAI adding new revenue streams. Margin improvement expected through AI-led automation.':s.sector==='Banking'?'Banking sector expects 14-16% credit growth in FY26. Net NPA improving across industry. RBI rate cut cycle will benefit floating rate books. GNPA targeting below 2.0%.':s.sector==='Energy'?'Energy sector benefits from India\'s 500GW renewable target by 2030. Oil prices stable at $70-85/bbl. Green energy capex creating long-term growth opportunities.':s.sector==='Defence'?'Defence sector — ₹6.2L Cr budget in FY26. 75% domestic procurement target. HAL, BEL order books at all-time highs. 25-30% revenue growth expected.':s.sector==='Auto'?'Auto sector — SUV+EV super cycle underway. FY26 volume growth 8-10% expected. EV penetration reaching 5-7% of total volumes. Premiumisation driving ASP growth.':s.sector==='Pharma'?'Pharma sector — US generics stabilizing. Specialty drugs driving margin expansion. CDMO/CMO opportunity growing. India chronic therapy growing 10%+.':s.sector==='FMCG'?'FMCG sector — rural recovery underway with normal monsoon. Volume growth expected 5-7% in FY26. Commodity inflation benign. Premiumisation trend intact in urban markets.':'Sector showing steady growth. Management guidance and order book visibility are positive indicators.'}`},
1611
{t:'bear',icon:'⚠️',title:'Key Risks to Monitor',text:`Primary risks: ${s.beta>1?'High market sensitivity (beta '+s.beta+')':''} ${s.sector==='IT'?'US tech spending slowdown, visa costs, AI disruption of headcount-based revenue model.':s.sector==='Banking'?'Rising NPA cycle in unsecured lending. Slow deposit growth squeezing NIMs. RBI regulatory actions.':s.sector==='Energy'?'Crude price volatility, OPEC decisions, green transition pace uncertainty.':s.sector==='Defence'?'Budget allocation risk, project delays, L1-based procurement keeping margins under pressure.':'Regulatory changes, competition, and commodity/FX headwinds.'}`},
1612
];
1613
document.getElementById('tab-insights').innerHTML=`
1614
<div class="card">
1615
<div class="ctitle">Analytical Insights — ${s.name}</div>
1616
<div class="ins-list">
1617
${ins.map(i=>`<div class="ins-item ins-${i.t}"><div class="ins-icon">${i.icon}</div><div class="ins-text"><strong>${i.title}</strong>${i.text}</div></div>`).join('')}
1618
</div>
1619
</div>`;
1620
}
1621
 
1622
// =====================================================================
1623
// INIT
1624
// =====================================================================
1625
renderGrid('All');
1626
</script>
1627
</body>
1628
</html>
1629
